name: magus-website-editor
description: Build-only dependencies for the committed browser bundles: the playground's CodeMirror editor (js/editor.js -> gen/playground/editor.js) and the graph explorer's d3-force view (js/graph-explorer.js -> gen/graph/explorer.js). esbuild (pinned in mise.toml) bundles each into a committed artifact, like gen/playground/buzz.wasm. `npm run build` is the entry point; magusfile.buzz (generate) runs `npm ci && npm run build`. Not part of the site's runtime dependency graph.

scripts.build: npm run build-editor && npm run build-graph-explorer && npm run build-mermaid && npm run build-hljs
